data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: The principle that decision time increases with the number and complexity of choices.
data.technical_spec: Simplified interface with curated playlists and search functionalities to reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: The time to acquire a target is a function of the distance to and size of the target.
data.technical_spec: Large, easy-to-click buttons for essential controls like play, pause, and skip.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Users perceive more aesthetic designs as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: A visually appealing design with a cohesive color palette and smooth animations.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: The average user can only keep 7 (plus or minus 2) items in their working memory.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined content arrangement with categorization features like 'Your Library' and 'Browse'.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Objects that are near each other appear to be grouped together.
data.technical_spec: Grouping related content like similar playlists and albums to enhance user navigation.
